# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  AppAssetsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'app-assets-bucket-${AWS::Region}'

  PublicReadAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    DependsOn: AppAssetsBucket
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AppAssetsBucket}/public-read-access/*'
      BucketName: !Ref AppAssetsBucket

Outputs:
  AppAssetsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for application assets
    Value: !Ref AppAssetsBucket
